code:
def power(x: float, n: int) -> float:
    """
    x^n ifadesini O(log n) karmaşıklığında hesaplar.
    """
    if n == 0:
        return 1.0

    is_negative = False
    if n < 0:
        is_negative = True
        n = -n

    result = 1.0
    current_x = x

    while n > 0:
        if n % 2 == 1:  # n tek ise
            result *= current_x
        current_x *= current_x  # current_x'i karesini alarak artır
        n //= 2  # n'i ikiye böl

    if is_negative:
        return 1.0 / result
    else:
        return result
